nasb.text: honey, curds, sheep, and cheese of the herd, for David and for the people who were with him, to eat; for they said, “The people are hungry and weary and thirsty in the wilderness.”

esv.text: honey and curds and sheep and cheese from the herd, for David and the people with him to eat, for they said, “The people are hungry and weary and thirsty in the wilderness.”

cnv.text: 蜂蜜、奶油、綿羊和乳酪送給大衛和跟隨他的人吃，因為他們說：“這些人在曠野一定又飢餓，又疲倦，又口渴了。”

ccb.text: 蜂蜜、奶油、绵羊和奶酪，送给大卫和跟随他的人，因为他们想：“众人在旷野跋涉，一定饥渴疲乏了。”
